scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui codegen && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui build:styles && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-docs dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/tokens build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-runtime build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-pixi build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-docs build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/tokens build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-runtime test && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui test && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-pixi test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/tokens build && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-runtime test -- --coverage.enabled && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui test -- --coverage.enabled && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-pixi test -- --coverage.enabled
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/tokens typecheck && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-pixi typecheck && pnpm --filter @tiny-playworks/game-ui-docs typecheck
